command.text:
declare @c varchar(8), @n decimal(16, 4) select @n = luong_tt from hrdmlttc where ngay_hl = (select max(ngay_hl) as ngay_hl from hrdmlttc where ngay_hl <= getdate()) select @n = isnull(@n, 0)
select @c = rtrim(val) from options where ma_phan_he = 'HR' and name = 'm_si_loai_nn'; select 'this._defaultSalary = ' + rtrim(@n) + ';this._salaryType = ''' + @c + ''';set$ViewPanelEmployeeID(this);load$BSPlannedForm(this);' as message return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$invalid nvarchar(512), @$ho_ten nvarchar(256) select @$ho_ten= ten from vhrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Ngày thay đổi đã có hoặc không hợp lệ.' else N'The change date is invalid or already exists.' end select @$invalid = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thời gian thay đổi của nhân viên %s1 bị lồng nhau với khai báo khác.' else N'The effective time of employee %s1 is invalid.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ((ngay_thay_doi = @ngay_thay_doi) or (ngay_thay_doi <= @ngay_thay_doi2 and ngay_thay_doi2 >= @ngay_thay_doi) or (ngay_thay_doi2 is null and ngay_thay_doi between @ngay_thay_doi and @ngay_thay_doi2) or (@ngay_thay_doi2 is null and @ngay_thay_doi between ngay_thay_doi and ngay_thay_doi2) ) ) begin select 'ngay_thay_doi' as field, @$exists as message return end
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec) select @stt_rec0 = max(stt_rec0), @line_nbr = max(line_nbr) from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec else select @stt_rec0 = '000', @line_nbr = 0
exec dbo.FastBusiness$HRM$GetRowID @stt_rec0 output, @line_nbr output select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 <> @stt_rec0 and ((ngay_thay_doi = @ngay_thay_doi) or (ngay_thay_doi <= @ngay_thay_doi2 and ngay_thay_doi2 >= @ngay_thay_doi) or (ngay_thay_doi2 is null and ngay_thay_doi between @ngay_thay_doi and @ngay_thay_doi2) or (@ngay_thay_doi2 is null and @ngay_thay_doi between ngay_thay_doi and ngay_thay_doi2) ) ) begin select 'ngay_thay_doi' as field, @$exists as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0

action.text:
declare @luong_tt decimal(16, 4), @tl_bhxh numeric(5, 2), @tl_bhyt numeric(5, 2), @tl_bhtn numeric(5, 2) select @luong_tt = luong_tt from hrdmlttc where ngay_hl = (select max(ngay_hl) as ngay_hl from hrdmlttc where ngay_hl <= @ngay_thay_doi)
if exists (select 1 from options where name = 'm_si_trich_bh' and val = '0') begin if exists (select 1 from hrttctxh where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ngay_hl_tu <= @ngay_thay_doi and (ngay_hl_den is null or ngay_hl_den >= @ngay_thay_doi)) select @tl_bhxh = tl_bhxh0 + tl_bhxh1 from hrdmtlbh where ngay_hl = (select max(ngay_hl) as ngay_hl from hrdmtlbh where ngay_hl <= @ngay_thay_doi) if exists (select 1 from hrttctyt where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ngay_hl_tu <= @ngay_thay_doi and (ngay_hl_den is null or ngay_hl_den >= @ngay_thay_doi)) select @tl_bhyt = tl_bhyt0 + tl_bhyt1 from hrdmtlbh where ngay_hl = (select max(ngay_hl) as ngay_hl from hrdmtlbh where ngay_hl <= @ngay_thay_doi) if exists (select 1 from hrttcttn where stt_rec = @stt_rec and ngay_hl_tu <= @ngay_thay_doi and (ngay_hl_den is null or ngay_hl_den >= @ngay_thay_doi)) select @tl_bhtn = tl_bhtn0 + tl_bhtn1 from hrdmtlbh where ngay_hl = (select max(ngay_hl) as ngay_hl from hrdmtlbh where ngay_hl <= @ngay_thay_doi) end else begin select @tl_bhxh = tl_bhxh0 + tl_bhxh1, @tl_bhyt = tl_bhyt0 + tl_bhyt1, @tl_bhtn = tl_bhtn0 + tl_bhtn1 from hrdmtlbh where ngay_hl = (select max(ngay_hl) as ngay_hl from hrdmtlbh where ngay_hl <= @ngay_thay_doi) end
select isnull(@luong_tt, 0) as luong_tt, isnull(@tl_bhxh, 0) as tl_bhxh, isnull(@tl_bhyt, 0) as tl_bhyt, isnull(@tl_bhtn, 0) as tl_bhtn return
